topStories.description: US late-night host Jimmy Kimmel is facing criticism online after mocking the country’s new Homeland Security chief as a “plumber” during his show, with many calling the remark elitist and dismissive of working-class professions.

topStories.title: Trump to hold cabinet meeting today amid DHS shutdown pressure and Iran war
topStories.description: The Cabinet forum is scheduled to begin at 10 a.m. EDT, with Trump expected to discuss both domestic operational challenges and foreign policy priorities amid the continuing DHS funding deadlock.

topStories.title: US tightens social media vetting — how your posts, likes may impact H-1B, K-3, G-5 visa applications
topStories.description: The US expanded its social media screening and vetting process to include more visa categories including G-5, H-3, H-4 dependents of H-3, K-1, K-2, K-3, Q, R-1, R-2, S, T, and U.

topStories.title: Russian officials meet US counterparts as Moscow denies aiding Iran
topStories.description: Kremlin spokesperson says talks are part of '​necessary dialogue' with Washington as war in Ukraine continues.

topStories.title: TSA wait times spike at major US airports as DHS funding stalemate continues
topStories.description: Acting TSA Administrator Ha Nguyen McNeill told Congress on Wednesday (March 25) that some airport wait times have exceeded 4.5 hours.

topStories.title: European Parliament gives conditional approval to EU-US trade deal
topStories.description: The agreement would see EU tariffs on US goods reduced to zero while US tariffs on EU imports set at 15%.

topStories.title: As a Palestinian, I stand in solidarity with the Iranian people. Here’s why
topStories.description: History teaches us that the West's promises of caring for our 'freedoms' are empty because imperialism wants control.

dailyNews.title: Iran-US war impacted ‘fertilisers, steel and aluminum’ the most, says Saudi Arabia Finance Minister
dailyNews.description: Saudi Arabia’s Finance Minister Al-Jadaan said that while oil has dominated media coverage, it is refined products – including fertilisers, steel and aluminum – that have been most affected due to the ongoing war.

dailyNews.title: From DKS to ‘Samrat Ashoka’, Karnataka MLAs dissolve party lines to seek free IPL tickets: ‘We are VIPs’
dailyNews.description: BJP leader raises issue in House; Congress MLA explains why KSCA must give special treatment to MLAs, demands five tickets each; speaker says four could do.

dailyNews.title: What's happening with Iran-US 'talks'?
dailyNews.description: Diplomatic efforts to end the war in Iran are accelerating. Proposals are being exchanged through Pakistan, though Iran denies direct talks with the US. Iran's demands include an end to aggression and financial compensation. The US seeks Iran's nuclear disarmament and missile program limits. Both sides need to claim victory for a deal. The conflict's outcome remains uncertain.

dailyNews.title: 'White Plague': One Of Humanity's Deadliest Killers Resurging In US
dailyNews.description: Tuberculosis is preventable and curable with antibiotics, but treatment typically lasts 6-9 months.

dailyNews.title: Trump urges GOP to end filibuster amid DHS shutdown, TSA staffing crisis, targets Chuck Schumer

dailyNews.title: Venezuela’s Maduro set to again appear in US court: How strong is the case?
dailyNews.description: March 26 hearing will be second court appearance since Maduro's January 3 abduction by US military.

dailyNews.title: Iran to Lebanon: Four million people displaced by US-Israeli war
dailyNews.description: Three million Iranians and at least a million Lebanese have been forced from their homes because of US-Israeli attacks.

dailyNews.title: Trump lashes out at 'sick' Iranian leaders, confirms estimated timeline for ending war
dailyNews.description: NATO failed a test by not joining the U.S. military operation against Iran, President Donald Trump said during a Thursday Cabinet meeting.

dailyNews.title: Harvard student says Jewish classmates feel 'unwelcome' as multibillion dollar DOJ lawsuit looms
dailyNews.description: A Harvard sophomore says Jewish students feel unwelcome as the Trump DOJ files a multibillion-dollar lawsuit over the school's handling of antisemitism.

dailyNews.title: Hotel fees are draining Americans' wallets as expert reveals how to avoid paying hundreds extra
dailyNews.description: Resort fees are not going away, a NerdWallet study finds, despite a new FTC rule that now requires hotels to show full prices upfront. An expert shared tips as travelers react.

dailyNews.title: Thomas Rhett admits fame led him to 'living a double life' that nearly destroyed his marriage
dailyNews.description: Country star Thomas Rhett says he was "spiritually unhealthy" at the height of his fame, admitting his marriage to Lauren Akins nearly fell apart.

dailyNews.title: America’s ‘undeclared emergency:’ Palantir exec talks Iran, deadly new US weapons and how to avoid World War 3
dailyNews.description: Palantir CTO Shyam Sankar warns the U.S. faces an 'undeclared emergency' and urges sweeping investment to deter World War III in his new book.

dailyNews.title: Savannah Guthrie speaks out on mother’s ‘grounded' faith, says it isn’t fake devotion
dailyNews.description: NBC's "Today" co-anchor Savannah Guthrie said she believes in prayer while opening up about her mother’s faith in an emotional interview that aired on Thursday.

dailyNews.title: Jim Jordan says probe into former CIA Director John Brennan is 'heating up' as DOJ seeks testimony records
dailyNews.description: Rep. Jim Jordan says a Justice Department probe into former CIA Director John Brennan is "heating up," saying he hopes it leads to accountability.

dailyNews.title: Melvin Foster, former college football star who later served as Texas deputy sheriff, dead at 59
dailyNews.description: Melvin Foster, a former star with the Iowa Hawkeyes who later served as a Texas sheriff's deputy, has died at the age of 59. His death was described as "unexpected."

dailyNews.title: Ex-Illinois governor Rod Blagojevich says Sheridan Gorman’s killing may have been a 'gang initiation'
dailyNews.description: Rod Blagojevich claims the illegal immigrant accused of killing Sheridan Gorman in Chicago did so as a gang initiation, alleging a political cover-up.

dailyNews.title: Blagojevich warns justice system is 'broken,' says his case was blueprint for Trump prosecutions
dailyNews.description: Former Illinois Gov. Rod Blagojevich claims his corruption prosecution paved the way for Trump's legal battles, calling the justice system broken.

topStories.title: Comedian Bill Maher to receive Kennedy Center's Mark Twain humor prize after initial White House denial
topStories.description: Comedian Bill Maher will receive the Kennedy Center's Mark Twain Prize after the White House called earlier reports of the honor fake news.

topStories.title: Young, GOP senators urge Trump to reinstate ‘Protect Life Rule’ to block Title X funds from abortion clinics
topStories.description: Sen. Todd Young and nine GOP colleagues are urging Trump to reinstate the Protect Life Rule, which would block Title X funds from abortion clinics.

topStories.title: Trump warns Iran to accept defeat as Israel kills another top commander
topStories.description: Trump warns Iran to make a deal on his terms "before it is too late," as Israel says it's killed the Iranian commander behind the Strait of Hormuz closure.

topStories.title: Trump says Iran is "begging to make a deal, not me"
topStories.description: President Trump held his first Cabinet meeting since the war in Iran began, and he continues to claim that Tehran wants to negotiate with the U.S. Mr. Trump also slammed NATO for its reluctance to join efforts against the regime.

topStories.title: Trump keeps saying Iran wants to negotiate despite Tehran's denials
topStories.description: President Trump continues to claim that Iran wants to negotiate a deal to end the war despite the regime denying those claims. CBS News' Chris Livesay and Aaron Navarro report.

topStories.title: A Landmark Verdict on the Danger of Social Media, and Trump’s Call to Punish ‘Rogue Judges’
topStories.description: Plus, OnlyFans’ billionaire owner dies at 43.

topStories.title: Some Judges See Risks in Fiery Opinions Warning of Threats to Democracy
topStories.description: Federal judges are weighing strategies for how to respond to the high stakes, anonymous threats and politicized atmosphere of the Trump era.

dailyNews.title: Trump Calls for Law Cracking Down on Crime and ‘Rogue Judges’
dailyNews.description: Ahead of the midterms, President Trump told a Republican gathering that he wants to go after repeat offenders and “rogue judges that are criminals.”

dailyNews.title: U.S. Military Kills 4 People in Boat Strike in Caribbean
dailyNews.description: At least 163 people have been killed in the Trump administration’s campaign against suspected drug smuggling.

dailyNews.title: After ‘Sausage Making,’ European Lawmakers Approve U.S. Trade Deal
dailyNews.description: The agreement that President Trump struck with the European Union has cleared a major hurdle that delayed it for months.

dailyNews.title: Wealthy Investors Target Foes of Clean Energy, Seeking Revenge
dailyNews.description: Renewable energy leaders said their industry got “rolled” in President Trump’s tax bill. Now they’re fighting back, starting in Texas.

dailyNews.title: Trump says oil and stock market reaction to Iran conflict not as severe as he expected
dailyNews.description: Trump expressed confidence in the war effort and said the economic damage will reverse.

dailyNews.title: Trump to Congress: End DHS shutdown or face 'very drastic measures'
dailyNews.description: Lawmakers are stalled on funding the Department of Homeland Security as airport delays mount.

dailyNews.title: Trump wants to squeeze Iran into peace talks with more troops — but it may backfire, analysts say
dailyNews.description: Trump's threats to ramp up military presence may be to pressure Iran to negotiate but the battle may be harder than he calculated, say analysts.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Justices Barrett, Gorsuch ‘sicken me’ after Supreme Court tariff ruling
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court, in a 6-3 ruling, said President Trump did not have authority under the International Emergency Economic Powers Act to impose tariffs.

dailyNews.title: Meet Figure AI: The company behind the humanoid robot hosted by Melania Trump
dailyNews.description: The White House hosted its first humanoid robot guest, with first lady Melania Trump appearing alongside a robot from startup Figure AI.

dailyNews.title: Attacks Escalate in Middle East as Trump Insists Iran Wants a Deal
dailyNews.description: Iran and Israel exchanged a new wave of strikes on Wednesday as President Donald Trump insisted Iran is desperate for a deal, saying, “They want to make a deal so badly, but they’re afraid to say it.” It comes as gas prices are continuing to rise worldwide with Iran blocking oil through the Strait of Hormuz. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

dailyNews.title: Trump holds a Cabinet meeting
dailyNews.description: Watch live coverage as President Donald Trump meets with his Cabinet at the White House.

dailyNews.title: DOJ says it erroneously relied on ICE memo to justify immigration courthouse arrests
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration admitted in a court filing that it had erroneously relied on an ICE memo to justify arrests at immigration courthouses as part of an ongoing federal case brought by groups seeking to block the tactic.
